description_long: This is a small, red-painted wooden cabin with a steeply pitched black gable roof, reminiscent of an A-frame structure. The front facade features a central door with a small overhang and two rectangular windows, one on each level, framed in a muted gray. The rear side is simpler, with a single small window near the roof peak and no visible door. The side walls are dark, with vertical metallic or weathered panels that contrast with the red wood, and the structure is elevated on short legs with a ladder leading to the entrance. The roof extends well beyond the walls, providing deep eaves and a sense of shelter. The overall appearance is rustic yet functional, suitable for a compact urban or park setting.
description: A compact, red wooden cabin with a steep black gable roof, front door, and windows, elevated on short legs with a ladder. The design is rustic and functional, with contrasting dark side panels and deep roof eaves.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabin, showing dark, weathered vertical panels and part of the roof overhang, with no windows or doors visible.
description_view_1: The rear of the cabin, featuring a red triangular wall with a single small window near the roof peak and no door.
description_view_2: The right side of the cabin, similar to the left, with dark vertical panels and no visible windows or doors.
description_view_3: The front of the cabin, displaying a central door with a small overhang, two rectangular windows, and a ladder leading up to the entrance.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with deep overhangs, constructed from dark materials
attribute_window_arrangement: Three rectangular windows: two on the front facade (one above the door, one to the left), and one small window centered high on the rear facade; windows are symmetrically placed on their respective walls
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, beneath a small overhang
